name: Heinrich Digital Team
subject: This is the biggest con:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | The fight for Martin's Senate seat is well underway, and we're really excited about our new television ad on health care that started airing this week.

**If we 're going to go toe-to-toe with Martin's self-funding opponents, including Gary Johnson, we need to keep this ad running up to Election Day.** **_[Contribute now to our Media Fund so we can keep our ads up across New Mexico!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-health-care-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+now+to+our+Media+Fund+so+we+c&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2")_**

* * *

Martin's opponents are claiming it's too expensive to expand access and improve health care for Americans. But that's a lie.

**The biggest con is saying we can 't have affordable health care.** The truth is, we can afford to invest in health care, lower drug costs, and protect Social Security. The only reason Martin's opponents, including Gary Johnson, say we can't is because they would rather give tax cuts to special interests and the wealthiest Americans.

**Martin knows we can improve and expand health care access, and that 's why it's critical we keep our new ad focused on health care running (_[you can watch it here](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-health-care-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+you+can+watch+it+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2")_).**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-health-care-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+CONTRIBUTE+NOW&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2")** We aren't getting a second chance at this election. There is so much at stake, which is why we have to make every day from now until November 6 count.

**_[Our campaign is powered by people like you, and we need your help to buy more airtime to keep our newest ad on the air. Donate here to help raise another $45,000 for our Media Fund before banks close tomorrow. Every contribution helps Martin defend his Senate seat!->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-health-care-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Our+campaign+is+powered+by+people+like+y&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180912_2_2")_**

name: Jake Fons
subject: Trump's fundraiser tonight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
$100,000 a person. At his own hotel.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912PM_em&amount=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto") Friend, tonight Donald Trump is holding a big money fundraiser with millionaires and billionaires that cost $100,000 a person to attend. Trump and Republicans will use every last dollar they raise to flood the airwaves, open offices, and contact voters to stop Democratic momentum before November. And in Minnesota, we are already seeing Republicans take to the airwaves and out in force. **Just Monday, we reported our opponent outspending us on the airwaves.** The only way we can take on the special interests and big donors on the other side is a wave of grassroots donations -- that's why we're coming to you now. **September is our final end-of-quarter deadline -- the last big chance to show how powerful this team is and make a public statement. I 'm tracking where we need to be by midnight tonight, and we're still $11,740 short of our goal from grassroots donors.** [**Can you pitch in $3 before midnight to close this gap and make sure we have the resources to stop Republicans from turning Minnesota red? Control of the Senate and the fate of Trump 's agenda is on the line in this race:**](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912PM_em&amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$3 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a88e/c1f7015/6d4f4c63/11411f45/2151376528/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=3")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a88e/c1f7015/6d4f4c63/11411f46/2151376528/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a88e/c1f7015/6d4f4c63/11411f47/2151376528/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a88e/c1f7015/6d4f4c63/11411f58/2151376528/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a88e/c1f7015/6d4f4c63/11411f59/2151376528/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a88e/c1f7015/6d4f4c63/11411f5a/2151376528/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912PM_em-exp&amount=25")
---
Big Republican donors (like the ones at Trump's fundraiser tonight) don't think of the checks they write as donations, they think of them as investments. And if you look at the millions of dollars Republicans handed them in tax breaks last year, you see why.
We know you give because you believe in something. Your values matter to you, and you believe it's time to stop Trump and fight for a progressive agenda. You're not expecting anything in return except a Senator like Tina who will bring those values with her to the Senate.
But, I'll be honest, the millionaires and billionaires on the other side have a lot of money, resources, and power -- and it will take a tremendous amount of grassroots energy to defeat them. That means everyone needs to step up and do their part.
[**Can you pitch in $3 so we can stay on track towards our September goal? Every dollar you can give will matter against the millions on the other side.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912PM_em&amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
Let's do this,
Jake Fons
Finance Director

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a88e/c1f7015/6d4f4c63/11411f5b/2151376528/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

body:

Trust us when we say that it's different from anything else that's out there. That's because Greg has a proven track record of delivering real, positive results for Arizonans.

_The best part? _ With your help, Greg's service to Arizona is just getting started.

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: just hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
What we do now will decide the outcome of this election.
#
Peter -
Midnight is quickly approaching, and when we get there, it'll be the end of our critical final fundraising drive.
There are just hours left before our primary, and it is anyone's race right now. So we're making a final push to reach undecided voters. What we do now will decide the outcome of this election. We can't do it alone.
**[Make a $3 donation to our campaign before our critical fundraising deadline comes to a close at midnight. Your donation matters tremendously.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780964/6e822e2f/1d2479f9/4173bd82/2092360050/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MTItMy1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180912-3-full")**
**Final Primary Fundraising Drive**
**Name: **Peter
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Previous Donor:** No, not yet!
**Suggested Donation:[$3.00](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780964/6e822e2f/1d2479f9/4173bd82/2092360050/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MTItMy1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180912-3-full")**
Our opponents have likely called in their corporate donors. They're asking Wall Street and real estate interests to save them at the last minute. We aren't doing that. We've rejected all corporate money. **[That's why your $3 donation is so important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780964/6e822e2f/1d2479f9/4173bd82/2092360050/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MTItMy1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180912-3-full")**
All our best,

### [If the Democrats Win - Get Ready for Impeachment](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-j/)
Democrats, for the most part, hate Donald Trump. There are, of course, a few exceptions. And there are a few Republicans, and a fair number of Independents, who don't care for him either. But most Democrats - they think he's gotta go. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Fact Checking the Fact Checker](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Cincinnati Enquirer is supposed to be the local paper of record. The one local folks go to who still read the paper - which is evidently a smaller and smaller population every year. My wife and I still get it, but I think they're down to two families on our block that do (including us.) Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-k/) [McCain and Me](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-u/)Since word came out that John McCain had passed away over the weekend, there have been many tributes to this Arizona Senator, American war hero, and almost-President. Rather than repeat a lot of what you've probably seen or heard since then, I thought I'd touch on a number of interactions I've had with him over the years. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Democrat Candidates for Congress are Misleading the Public](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-n/)
Democrats running for congress across the country are doing everything they can to mislead the public on a number of key issues. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-p/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-x/)
### [V](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-m/)[ice President Pence Comes to Cincinnati](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-c/)
The Vice President of the United States was in town yesterday and I had the honor of introducing him at a panel discussion. I thought I'd give you a rundown of our day. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-q/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-a/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-f/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-v/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjikhydd-kujkulhluu-e/)

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: “What’s a CFO?”-- and why it matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OR4vjvSPsoQVmYJj79aFE7288afk656GGwW8Nv2I61g=/GAEurdgFuo0afW2lmLx4H4BLpwbW_JdBOA_eljHf9Ig=) Friends and Neighbors -- _" What's a CFO?"_ _" Wait, the CFO is an elected position?"_ I have gotten these questions a lot since I decided to get in the race to be Florida's next Chief Financial Officer (CFO). **While the role of CFO doesn 't make headlines, it's one of the most important and consequential positions in our state government. ** But don't just take my word for it. Here are just a few of the reasons why the office of CFO - and who holds it - matters: \- The CFO has audit authority which makes it Floridians' last line of defense when it comes to making sure that their money is actually being spent the way they've been told its been spent; \- The CFO is a Trustee to the Florida Retirement System (FRS), which currently has nearly $200 billion in assets and over 650,000 Floridians as beneficiaries. Given its size, the FRS is a frequent target of the Legislature when it comes to budget time. The CFO, as Trustee, is responsible for making sure that doesn't happen; \- The CFO is a member of Florida's Cabinet which gives them oversight over important issues like voting rights restoration, land use and conservation, veterans affairs, utilities management and so much more. [Help JR Become Our Next CFO. Chip in $20.18](https://act.myngp.com/el/OR4vjvSPsoQVmYJj79aFE7288afk656GGwW8Nv2I61g=/JtohlHO5cLU-eWxN-y7nXUfSBIMXusLoVcn9GqwJ1Bo=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) I know that I can take my innovative leadership experience from the business world and the State Senate into the cabinet to help build a better, stronger Florida, with an economy ready made for the 21st century. **But I can 't get there without your help**. **[Can you contribute $20.18 - to help me bring our innovative vision to the cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/OR4vjvSPsoQVmYJj79aFE7288afk656GGwW8Nv2I61g=/JY8njT9pFzLB0tIYTLCWJKvrXoR8-GqrvsVnjmh_al8=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Two outstanding Democratic women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
This November **we need to gain just two more seats in the Senate** to be able to advance big policy priorities that would make a difference for all Americans -- priorities like lowering prescription drug costs, ensuring accessible and affordable health care, and getting workers ready for 21st century jobs.
**[We can get it done if we come together and elect two outstanding Democratic women: Jacky Rosen in Nevada and Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0r7ZtLlnl6VUeEqmAhfM8%2B%2FVsISjKiv1)**
**In Arizona, Congresswoman Kyrsten Sinema** has been a tireless advocate for women, families, and the military. Before entering politics Kyrsten was a social worker, and in Congress she has stood up for DREAMers and the _Violence Against Women Act_. And her opponent voted to repeal the _Affordable Care Act_ and deny protections for people with pre-existing medical conditions.
**And in Nevada, Congresswoman Jacky Rosen** has been a champion for early childhood education in STEM -- something she knows pretty well as a computer programmer (and graduate of the University of Minnesota!). Jacky first ran for office in 2016, and now she's taking on one of the most important Senate races in the country. And, you guessed it, her opponent voted to repeal the _Affordable Care Act_ too.
**Jacky and Kyrsten have been strong advocates for women and families in the House, and now they need our help to get to the Senate. [Will you make a donation to EMILY's List that will go directly to Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona and Jacky Rosen in Nevada?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=DI%2FJANnNhcyheGmktgA6re%2FVsISjKiv1)**
Thank you,
Amy

[**Contribute**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=SZfCi8rNbjW31%2Ffe%2FLIQ%2Bu%2FVsISjKiv1)

subject: President Trump Promises All-Out Response to Hurricane Florence
body:
| |
---
#
# **_President Trump Promises All-Out Response to Hurricane Florence_**
#
“President Donald Trump on Tuesday said the federal government would spare no expense in responding to the likely damage from Hurricane Florence,” Reuters reports. “Whatever it takes, we’re going to do it,” the President said. President Trump and FEMA have urged all Americans in the storm’s path to take any necessary precautions, including evacuation where necessary. “This has an opportunity of being a very devastating storm,” FEMA Administrator Brock Long said. **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEzLjk0ODQ4NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMy45NDg0ODY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://ijr.com/2018/09/1123116-trump-promises-response-hurricane-florence/) ** “Remember those warnings of an economic implosion if Donald Trump was elected President? Well, instead, the economy has broken out of the 2% growth doldrums from 2009-2016, and Barack Obama is suddenly elbowing his way back into the public debate to claim credit,” [**_The Wall Street Journal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEzLjk0ODQ4NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMy45NDg0ODY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.wsj.com/amp/articles/trumps-income-bump-1536793484) editorial board writes. “The Department of Transportation is waiving federal trucking rules to ease the flow of gasoline and other fuels into the Hurricane Florence impact zone that extends from South Carolina to Maryland,” John Siciliano reports for the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEzLjk0ODQ4NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMy45NDg0ODY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/policy/energy/trump-administration-relaxes-trucking-rules-prevent-fuel-electricity-shortages-hurricane-florence). “The fuel situation is one of the first situations that goes short during an emergency,” said Alex Keenan, Emergency Coordinator for the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration. “Vice President Pence will go to Atlanta on Thursday to review preparations for Hurricane Florence, the Category 4 storm that is expected to make landfall later this week,” Tal Axelrod reports in** _[The Hill](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEzLjk0ODQ4NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMy45NDg0ODY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&http://thehill.com/homenews/administration/406321-pence-heading-to-georgia-ahead-of-hurricane-florence)_**. “It was projected Wednesday that Florence would shift slightly to the south and possibly hit Georgia as well” as North Carolina, South Carolina, and Virginia. On Wednesday, President Trump signed an order authorizing a procedure that will “deter foreign countries or people from meddling in U.S. elections, creating a mechanism to automatically impose sanctions when intelligence agencies detect cyberattacks” S.A. Miller reports in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEzLjk0ODQ4NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMy45NDg0ODY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/sep/12/trump-oks-sanctions-foreigners-election-meddling/).
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEzLjk0ODQ4NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMy45NDg0ODY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEzLjk0ODQ4NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMy45NDg0ODY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEzLjk0ODQ4NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMy45NDg0ODY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Peter - It's time to vote for Zephyr!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Make your voice heard by voting today.
#
Today's the day, Peter!
We get to vote for Zephyr for Attorney General. According to our records, you live in New York, so polls are open from 6 AM to 9 PM. **[Click here if you need to find your polling location.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780965/6e822e2f/1d220505/4173bc26/3729451200/VEsH/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov")**
[FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780965/6e822e2f/1d220505/4173bc27/3729451200/VEsE/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov/")
This is the day we've been working so hard for, and now, we get to exercise our constitutional right by voting. There's no more important responsibility in our democracy, and there's never been a more important time to vote.
After you vote for Zephyr, remind your friends and family to vote too. Share it on social media and show off your "I voted" for everyone to see. If we all vote, then we are going to win.
Step one in saving our democracy is voting, so thank you for voting for Zephyr for Attorney General.
Now, let's go win this thing!
\- Team Zephyr
[FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780965/6e822e2f/1d220505/4173bc27/3729451200/VEsF/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov/")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY

1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. There's no more important responsibility in our democracy, and there's never been a more important time to vote. After you vote for Zephyr, remind your friends and family to vote too. Share it on social media and show off your "I voted" for everyone to see. If we all vote, then we are going to win. Step one in saving our democracy is voting, so thank you for voting for Zephyr for Attorney General. Now, let's go win this thing! \- Team Zephyr "" * Paid for by Zephyr for NY 1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

name: Jason Yates
subject: Guess how many federal court nominees have been confirmed since 2017
body:
Peter,
There have been important updates this last month on judicial confirmations.
When President Trump took office in January 2017 there were 108 vacancies out of 870 appointed life-term federal judicial positions on the courts.
Do you know how many of President Trump’s nominated federal judges have been confirmed by the Senate so far? Click on one of the answers below to see if you are correct.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iYO3JTpq1qZKMRngkZt3QK_WCo7O2-IsatVy80oQ8wASNdrDQ-nnwMKKfsjB9zlWoxZLVItYxOTY-yzsQ3SzfC0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180913qna01&n=1)
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iYO3JTpq1qZKMRngkZt3QK_WCo7O2-IsatVy80oQ8wASNdrDQ-nnwMKKfsjB9zlWo5yhPeuxdwSI-jsuKvCESHM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180913qna01&n=2)

[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iYO3JTpq1qZKMRngkZt3QK_WCo7O2-IsatVy80oQ8wASNdrDQ-nnwMKKfsjB9zlWoy6nMOt7LyuOuW4zO_z15ro&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180913qna01&n=4)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: The headlines say it all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Last week, Governor Eric Holcomb and Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch went on the road to detail Indiana's new $1 billion plan for funding major, long...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/nextlevelconnections?e=1acd9bb3d6)

ICYMI: Next Level Connections in the News
Indiana's infrastructure is getting a big boost!
Last week, Governor Eric Holcomb and Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch went on the road to detail Indiana's new $1 billion plan for funding major, long worked-toward infrastructure projects. Next Level Connections will better connect Indiana to points across the state and around the globe.

Next Level Connections is generating headlines and excitement from leaders statewide! Check out this video (http://www.insideindianabusiness.com/clip/14615861/gov-outlines-1b-in-infrastructure-projects) , and hear directly from Governor Holcomb as he discussed the positive impact these projects will have on the future of our state:
http://www.insideindianabusiness.com/clip/14615861/gov-outlines-1b-in-infrastructure-projects
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch has also been making the rounds -- including speaking to the Greater Kokomo Chamber of Commerce Luncheon (http://www.kokomotribune.com/news/local_news/in-kokomo-visit-crouch-says-plan-could-help-local-trails/article_b4c06efe-b21c-11e8-84fb-77283be02b35.html) and giving radio interviews across the state -- to discuss the big investments that are part of Next Level Connections:
* Finishing I-69, providing the final leg connecting Evansville and Indianapolis
* Making fewer stops between South Bend and Indianapolis on U.S. 31
* Improving U.S. 20 and U.S. 30 in Northern Indiana
* Making affordable broadband available in ALL parts of the state
* Attracting more international nonstop flights to Indiana
* Building a fourth water port in Southern Indiana
* Expanding rail service in Northwest Indiana
* Connecting communities through biking, hiking and riding trails

Listen here to a great conversation (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/videos/261569231352606/) Lt. Governor Crouch had with WBAT in Marion:
https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/videos/261569231352606/
Meanwhile, leaders in local government, rural electric, land conservation, and beyond are praising this as a game-changing move for Indiana in articles running across the state:

Op-Ed: Governor Gives Rural Indiana a Great Push
Daniel Elliott, Member of the Morgan County Council & Morgan County GOP Chairman

Last week here in Martinsville, Gov. Eric Holcomb announced his Next Level Connections program. As a Morgan County elected official, I’m excited to see that as Section 5 of I-69 ends, Holcomb has found a way to accelerate completion of Section 6, the final leg of I-69. It’s an important step for Morgan County and will be a great boon for our residents, businesses and visitors. I-69’s growth is a great opportunity for the people of Morgan County, and Next Level Connections will allow this stretch of highway to be completed three years early.

Continue Reading... (https://www.indystar.com/story/opinion/2018/09/11/op-ed-governor-gives-rural-indiana-great-push/1259536002/)

SHARE ON SOCIAL MEDIA:
https://twitter.com/home?status=Through%20Gov.%20%40HolcombforIN's%20%23NextLevelConnections,%20the%20early%20completion%20of%20I-69%20will%20benefit%20Hoosiers,%20Indiana%20businesses%20and%20visitors.%20https%3A//www.indystar.com/story/opinion/2018/09/11/op-ed-governor-gives-rural-indiana-great-push/1259536002/
https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.indystar.com%2Fstory%2Fopinion%2F2018%2F09%2F11%2Fop-ed-governor-gives-rural-indiana-great-push%2F1259536002%2F
Hoosiers applaud rural broadband expansion
Tom Van Paris, Indiana Electric Cooperatives CEO

Gov. Eric Holcomb’s Next Level Connections announcement last Tuesday was monumental for all of Indiana, but especially the 1.3 million Hoosiers served by Indiana’s electric cooperatives. In addition to announcing funding for transportation projects that will connect the state in multiple ways, Indiana’s electric cooperatives were most encouraged by the $100 million investment to expand high-speed internet service for the rural areas of the state.

Continue Reading... (https://www.indystar.com/story/opinion/readers/2018/09/09/letters-editor/829727002/)

SHARE ON SOCIAL MEDIA:
https://twitter.com/home?status=In%20addition%20to%20funding%20for%20transportation%20projects%20that%20will%20connect%20the%20state,%20$100M%20of%20Gov.%20%40HolcombforIN's%20%23NextLevelConnections%20will%20expand%20high-speed%20internet%20service%20for%20rural%20Indiana.%20https%3A//www.indystar.com/story/opinion/readers/2018/09/09/letters-editor/829727002/
https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.indystar.com/story/opinion/readers/2018/09/09/letters-editor/829727002/
Editorial: Governor's Announcement is Great News for the County
Martinsville Reporter-Times
We appreciate the governor’s boldness to provide the necessary funding to complete the final leg of I-69 in Indiana early, thereby opening up a vital transportation artery that will bring plenty of benefits throughout the state, and right here in Morgan County.

Continue Reading... (https://www.reporter-times.com/news/opinion/columns/editorial-governor-s-announcement-is-great-news-for-the-county/article_1dd3b326-d73e-5dec-947f-d77d6845d467.html)

https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.reporter-times.com/news/opinion/columns/editorial-governor-s-announcement-is-great-news-for-the-county/article_1dd3b326-d73e-5dec-947f-d77d6845d467.html
Next Level Connections Has Dividends for Generations
Mary McConnell, Indiana State Director, The Nature Conservancy

The Nature Conservancy is proud to work with the governor and many others to help design a comprehensive program that can link people and communities with nature. Gov. Holcomb’s Next Level Connections is a unique and visionary plan to elevate the quality of life in Indiana. It’s also a great way to help Hoosiers reap the benefits of conservation while protecting our natural heritage.

Continue Reading... (https://www.nwitimes.com/opinion/letters/next-level-connections-has-dividends-for-generations/article_4ed51ee8-18b1-5c4a-b59b-b92dee1aabd8.html)

SHARE ON SOCIAL MEDIA:
https://twitter.com/home?status=Gov.%20%40HolcombforIN's%20%23NextLevelConnections%20=%20Unique%20%26%20Visionary%20https%3A//www.nwitimes.com/opinion/letters/next-level-connections-has-dividends-for-generations/article_4ed51ee8-18b1-5c4a-b59b-b92dee1aabd8.html
https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.nwitimes.com/opinion/letters/next-level-connections-has-dividends-for-generations/article_4ed51ee8-18b1-5c4a-b59b-b92dee1aabd8.html
Swarens: Eric Holcomb — Indiana's No Drama, Quiety Effective Governor
Tim Swarens, Indianapolis Star

On Tuesday, Holcomb introduced a plan to spend $1 billion on completing I-69 ahead of schedule, further upgrading U.S. 31, improving U.S. 20 and 30, attracting more direct international flights to Indianapolis, pushing broadband service to rural areas, and building more hiking and biking trails.

All of that will be accomplished without a general tax increase. Instead, trucking companies will pay higher user fees on the Indiana Toll Road. Even then, those fees will remain lower than in most other states with toll roads, including Illinois.

Continue Reading... (https://www.indystar.com/story/opinion/columnists/tim-swarens/2018/09/11/indiana-governor-eric-holcomb-no-drama-quietly-effective-governor-says-tim-swarens/1256354002/)

SHARE ON SOCIAL MEDIA:
https://twitter.com/home?status=Steady.%20Pragmatic.%20Effective.%20Efficient.%20https%3A//www.indystar.com/story/opinion/columnists/tim-swarens/2018/09/11/indiana-governor-eric-holcomb-no-drama-quietly-effective-governor-says-tim-swarens/1256354002/
https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.indystar.com/story/opinion/columnists/tim-swarens/2018/09/11/indiana-governor-eric-holcomb-no-drama-quietly-effective-governor-says-tim-swarens/1256354002/
Be on the lookout, as Governor Holcomb's Next Level Connections plan makes game-changing investments into our state that will improve Hoosiers' connections locally, regionally, and globally for generations to come!

And, perhaps best of all, it all comes without a general tax increase for Hoosiers!

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Politico: “Inside the GOP’s rescue mission for Ted Cruz”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Last weekend, Politico published a piece called “Inside the GOP’s rescue
mission for Ted Cruz,” a behind-the-scenes look at what’s going on in
Cruz’s camp as we get closer to the election.

And it’s clear: they’re
scrambling. Ted Cruz and all the special-interest groups in his corner
know there’s a real chance he’s going to lose to Beto in November.

The most recent polling shows Beto down just one point -- within the
margin of error. And that’s not by accident: it’s because you (and tens of
thousands of people like you, who are ready for a change in Washington)
have stepped up, time and time again, to completely power our movement.

September is the final end-of-quarter FEC filing deadline of this
campaign, and we set our goals really, really high. We need to reach them
if we’re going to fight back against Cruz and the outside groups in his
corner. Help us get a jump-start on reaching our ambitious end-of-quarter
fundraising goal with a donation of
$3
to Beto today.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7221?refcode=em20180913&t=1019&akid=9611%2E444211%2E9by6Pt ]Contribute
$3
»

With only 54 days until Election Day, Cruz and his backers are going to
pull out all the stops to try to stop our momentum.

Politico reported at least ten groups that are spending -- or planning to
spend -- in Texas to influence the outcome of this election:

* Club for Growth (seven-figure ad buy)
* Senate Conservatives Fund
* Tea Party Patriots
* Republican Jewish Coalition
* Family Research Council
* Koch's AFP
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce
* McConnell Sen. Leadership Fund
* Senate Reform Fund
* Ending Spending

It’s hard to predict how many attacks are coming our way. But you know how
we’re going to respond to each of them?

By keeping our nose to the grindstone, doubling down and
working harder than ever before to elect Beto.

That means knocking on doors, making phone calls to voters and, yes,
donating $5, $10, $25 -- whatever you can afford -- to emails just like
this one to make sure Beto never misses a goal.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7221?refcode=em20180913&t=1020&akid=9611%2E444211%2E9by6Pt ]Help Beto fight back against the ten outside groups that are planning
to spend in Texas to try to stop our movement. Contribute
a donation of
$3
today.

Unlike Senator Ted Cruz, in this race for Senate, Beto hasn’t taken a dime
from PACs or special-interest groups. Why? Because he’s not running to
represent them in the Senate. He’s running to represent you.

Thank you for making our campaign possible.

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7221?refcode=em20180913&t=1021&akid=9611%2E444211%2E9by6Pt ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180913footer&t=1022&akid=9611%2E444211%2E9by6Pt

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=9611%2E444211%2E9by6Pt

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

body:
| | | | Hey, making sure you see this, team. I just checked, and we still need to raise $23,000 for our Media Fund before banks close today.

Use the link below to watch Martin's newest ad and help keep it on the air:

**_[http://nm.martinheinrich.com/new-ad](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-health-care-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+httpnmmartinheinrichcomnewad&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3")_**

_Begin original message:_

The fight for Martin's Senate seat is well underway, and we're really excited about our new television ad on health care that started airing this week.

**If we 're going to go toe-to-toe with Martin's self-funding opponents, including Gary Johnson, we need to keep this ad running up to Election Day.** **_[Contribute now to our Media Fund so we can keep our ads up across New Mexico!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-health-care-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+now+to+our+Media+Fund+so+we+c&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3")_**

* * *

Martin's opponents are claiming it's too expensive to expand access and improve health care for Americans. But that's a lie.

**The biggest con is saying we can 't have affordable health care.** The truth is, we can afford to invest in health care, lower drug costs, and protect Social Security. The only reason Martin's opponents, including Gary Johnson, say we can't is because they would rather give tax cuts to special interests and the wealthiest Americans.

**Martin knows we can improve and expand health care access, and that 's why it's critical we keep our new ad focused on health care running (_[you can watch it here](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-health-care-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+you+can+watch+it+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3")_).**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-health-care-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+CONTRIBUTE+NOW&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_1_3")** We aren't getting a second chance at this election. name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Another thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
| Peter, thank you -- with your help, we were able to surpass last night’s grassroots fundraising goal. I hate this part of campaigning, but I know it’s important. So, I am grateful that you keep opening our emails and showing your support. When I decided to get in this race, I knew I wanted to run the kind of campaign we could be proud of -- one focused on bringing people together to tackle the issues we face here in Tennessee. I also knew that, despite our victories in past statewide elections, we have an uphill battle to fight against the hyper-partisanship dominating our politics. Thanks to supporters like you taking action, now and in the coming months, we’re going to send a message across our state -- and our country -- that a campaign focused on common sense can still win elections. And we’re going to reset the priorities in Washington, get back to basics, and get things done. Thanks for your help, —Phil Bredesen | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2181830/11291359/-1190505252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGM2MjRjYS04OGI3LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AhZwprT0RBLKVKqSjFMOuZIQCdh_wbYiNjEAWV5EFM=&refcode=em180913-attacks-9-thanks&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Fox News Op-Ed: America needs a border wall and an immigration policy to protect Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate[Click here to unsubscribe
body:
Fox News asked me to write an op-ed on my solution to the immigration crisis. Hello Peter, I recently wrote an op-ed on my solution to the current immigration crisis.

If you can, please read my position on this critical topic. If you agree that we need better enforcement of our existing laws, [please contribute to my campaign.](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=4baf7a4e1213406db95ef1f97652cb86&_e=Kg99MIi7c_J1_Ti1hwHDrAe5dCv1pmpZyjqH_jmsfBSgjkhp_Wl1DN22MWRP4yUsuf0UGbwsQanJNAxD6IJl9RAqEk0nmSUlJjofupVulQshrDYCv_pqM_wwrQf0oI5MPcrrsYd8XLQZFL_Cyd1tVT-fiaUvAAwK5fTTeBD9Jk2Qv7jGQwyoHp4pWlwuhOOeb3KvNU4he5O3CaDpxgY3exxbWfhTVJDNQb0kSOJqar-gYmYDU_abfgxNGpNEm7lTWAVkXqBOm1-MYcgQV12XJciB_-mi-6NNy5iIF_tpyPH6COBJn9dKfzE3pCijSlVLUXTDsjkI0KKsn4RTUN1NR-eI07LC8xLA4Q3sh_nYcRP3a7m-gqNWAu7vKyxG70Y6)

Senator McCaskill has done nothing to solve this problem - we deserve better from our Senator. [ Stand With Josh - Donate Now! ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=4baf7a4e1213406db95ef1f97652cb86&_e=Kg99MIi7c_J1_Ti1hwHDrAe5dCv1pmpZyjqH_jmsfBSgjkhp_Wl1DN22MWRP4yUsuf0UGbwsQanJNAxD6IJl9RAqEk0nmSUlJjofupVulQshrDYCv_pqM_wwrQf0oI5MPcrrsYd8XLQZFL_Cyd1tVT-fiaUvAAwK5fTTeBD9Jk3gLkMnb8VkDbagUx1jyOZlqgSUcNfIs2mxsphOTpebpQqpSGBsGxP0cjqgNWVBkpnUGUct-Qp-niPlTwFSiYIamJrHpSL5f0wklrZpna26oEKiqgxcEwg7fuKpq1JvFJ6AEsHRFOxGvicyh2aSCJWfC6-cE-PMpF9aq0Ik_AvXmP1SsxhqyCikzPgb3SukxJm2od94EzY_N43Mn44ambcq) Thank you,

Josh Hawley **America needs a border wall and an immigration policy to protect Americans** by: Josh Hawley My grandfather was the first generation of our family born in the United States. His parents came to this country from Norway and became farmers, which is what my grandpa did too until the day he died. Grandpa was fiercely proud to be an American citizen. He once told me his father wouldn’t teach him Norwegian because “this family is American now.” Grandpa never forgot it. I haven’t forgotten it either. When you come to this country, you join a family – the American family. And in America, we stick up for one another, believe in one another, fight for one another.
Unfortunately, our ruling elite has given up on all that. They’ve become globalists first and Americans second. If you want to see Exhibit A, look at Sen. Claire McCaskill, D-Mo., who I am running against in the November election.While illegal immigrants pour across our southern border, bringing drugs and gangs and lower wages with them, McCaskill won’t vote to build the President Trump’s proposed border wall. She won’t vote to secure the border. And she lavishly praises the extremists in her party who want to abolish the Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agency. That’s bad enough. But now she is sponsoring the most radical open-border bill ever introduced in Congress. Her bill was written by California liberal Democratic Sen. Diane Feinstein, and it would give a free pass to any illegal immigrant who brings a child to the border. With McCaskill’s approach, illegal immigrants who use children as human shields would win release into the interior of this country, no questions asked. That’s wrong. That’s lawless. That’s not Missouri. [ READ MORE... ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=4baf7a4e1213406db95ef1f97652cb86&_e=5MP18iKjGJUHZhavpCCHIAw9xIGBTT_P1nWEx6kGJZjRq7AUmuhh8se_qaxfffchbfD7br4rUio71ncevhsSsWH_-dIFlKeotYBlrLcZ11XNAK5bA5eEt1-UxH_HsVri4_JOjRl-FkFY59WkEr1DprnPBbElOTkLTobqO3VxTomvFYi9iVf3EUqdl0WvVHp4MkQVoFqrNVO2Rzo4GpQzsRY35VZAjo2v6lLIFnzDvwpwVic2JdsvTsFB5GX6kNDiP6kfQJcttXlou6f1D3gXaBIjLhobgBae2kc0gD4L2OoBLxf4t2tCVAyPZKWz8B7oa2HvfDmCoe-8-HBYYj7raCvJqpGrbjt7AGaH0Zo24IuPwyp3hCIN0aVvnCHam_2GQSINZ_5R5sdxjutMTFFnjKDCpSpzIsW1NF_RnPfwyYzzJtUNdn0vikXYgH8xrregOZo5cUCbSAWnZ2Ukd9f4tLAcjGkwkG5roehYKDw8RV3zH3SliTpYnhjpNTcUVqOl)

name: Simone, Mary Ellen, me
subject: Re: $50k budget gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e62ab/51dbcc2a/1dfee3d0/3a8ff04/1107675751/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Hey there,

I wanted to make sure you're included in this conversation about Bob's campaign budget.

As Mary Ellen said below, it's going to take another $50,000 in donations from supporters like you to avoid making serious cuts to Bob's advertising budget.

**_[Can you chip in $5 to help close this budget gap?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180913_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Right now, Bob's opponent is using his war chest to put his ads in front of even more voters, so we can't scale back. Pennsylvanians need to know what's at stake in this election and that Bob is fighting for them. To do that, we need money that, frankly, this campaign doesn't have right now.

**If every member of this grassroots network donates just $5 before midnight on Saturday, we'll close this $50,000 budget gap and put Bob in a really good position going into November.**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180913_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Simone

Simone Baer
Finance Director
Bob Casey for Senate
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Mary Ellen Smith
To: Simone Baer
Subject: $50k budget gap

Following up on our meeting -- these budget numbers aren't looking good, and I'm getting really worried, especially after we missed our August fundraising goal.

I'm going to need to make decisions about what's in the ad budget based on the money in the bank at the end of the day on Saturday. I need to see an additional $50,000 in donations to avoid cutting the budget.

Thanks,

Mary Ellen

Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Manager
Bob Casey for Senate

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Ben Jealous
subject: We're making history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Let's fight for better representation.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bac1/7ab0e2c4/7e21f38c/34988631/401915189/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/better-rep-md-ga-fl?source=OHQ09138A") Friend, Look, we know African Americans are underrepresented in elected office -- but this year, people are taking notice. To reach political equity -- a place where African American elected officials represent the community's population statistically -- we have some work to do. Today, I am joining others in our community to do my part to fix the challenge of African American underrepresentation in elected offices throughout our nation. I'm coming together with two other progressive champions trying to make history in their states: Andrew Gillum, who's running to be the first black governor of Florida, and Stacey Abrams, running to be the first black governor of Georgia -- and the first black female governor in the country. Together, we are hoping to up the number of African Americans elected to statewide office from _just three_ to **_three more_**. [**Add your name next to Andrew's, Stacey's, and mine to stand with us as we fight for more equal representation in our states and in our country.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bac1/7ab0e2c4/7e21f38c/34988631/401915189/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/better-rep-md-ga-fl?source=OHQ09138A") | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bac1/7ab0e2c4/7e21f38c/34988631/401915189/VEsF/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/better-rep-md-ga-fl?source=OHQ09138A")
---
The promise of our democracy is that our government would be _for the people_ and _of the people_.
But according to "Who Represents.Us," a project of the Women's Donor Network, 90% of elected officials in the United States are white. Increasing the number of African Americans in public office, at all levels, ensures our nation upholds its promise of a truly representative democracy.
Stacey, Andrew, and I all have incredibly tough races, and it'll be an uphill battle to make history. When you're up against corporate-backed Republican campaigns like we are, who run from change at every turn, each grassroots member of the team makes a difference.
[**I am ready to make history this year with Stacey and Andrew -- sign on if you are with us!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bac1/7ab0e2c4/7e21f38c/34988631/401915189/VEsC/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/better-rep-md-ga-fl?source=OHQ09138A")
Thanks,
Ben

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bac1/7ab0e2c4/7e21f38c/34988630/401915189/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ09138Ab")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bac1/7ab0e2c4/7e21f38c/34988633/401915189/VEsA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bac1/7ab0e2c4/7e21f38c/34988632/401915189/VEsB/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bac1/7ab0e2c4/7e21f38c/3498863d/401915189/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bac1/7ab0e2c4/7e21f38c/3498863c/401915189/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Martha Roby for Congress
subject: Small Business Optimism Hits 45-Year High
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Martha Roby for Congress
body:
| | | | [View in browser](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=129A149A9A3879)

---
| | [](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=129A149A9A3880)
---
| | Friends,
I'm writing to share some fantastic economic news! This week, the National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB) released its [Small Business Optimism Index from the month of August](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=129A149A9A3881), and it showed a new record high in the survey's 45-year history.

It has become increasingly clear that Americans are working and prospering, and small businesses are thriving. Thanks to our conservative, pro-growth policies, our economy is booming.

As your representative in Congress, I will keep fighting for hardworking Alabamians and our job creators in AL-02 who contribute so much to our local economy. I look forward to seeing this exciting momentum continue.
\- Martha

name: Team Klobuchar Debate Update
subject: you won't believe this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:

In a recent candidate questionnaire, Amy's opponent was asked, "Do you believe in climate change?" and you won't believe his one-word answer:

**" No."**

And in a recent debate he doubled down, saying: _" Do I believe climate change is man-made? No, I do not."_

**Donate today to say loud and clear: I believe in science. I believe in action to reduce greenhouse gases. And I believe in Amy.**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I'm heading back to the debate stage and I'm giving away some tickets for you to join me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I'm heading back to the debate stage at the end of this month and I would love for you to join me.

My team only has a few tickets to the debate, and while it will be live on TV all across Virginia, I'd really love to see some friendly faces in the audience - so we decided to give away a pair of our tickets to a supporter, like you. We'll get to chat a little bit and you'll be there as my team and I take on a challenge we've been preparing for all month.

**If you pitch in a few bucks to support the campaign - $10, or whatever you can - by[midnight tomorrow,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ce/3e0906/73825e59/3e363bb1/1556867887/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?refcode=20180913_1_FR_TK_Sweepstakes-2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+midnight+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180913_1_FR_TK_Sweepstakes-2&source=20180913_1_FR_TK_Sweepstakes-2") you'll be automatically entered for a shot at those tickets. What do you say, Derek: Want to come along for the ride?**

**_You can enter by clicking here on the contest page:_**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Debate-Tickets](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ce/3e0906/73825e59/3e363bb0/1556867887/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?refcode=20180913_1_FR_TK_Sweepstakes-2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimkainecomDebateTickets&utm_campaign=20180913_1_FR_TK_Sweepstakes-2&source=20180913_1_FR_TK_Sweepstakes-2")

Good luck!

_Tim_

name: Frank Schultz, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: Hugin will never be on your side, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

It's pretty clear-cut here: You don't pay a $280 million settlement if you did nothing wrong.

And if you have been accused of misleading cancer patients and putting their lives in further danger by hiding potentially fatal side effects, you certainly don't say that you are proud of the work you have done.

But that is exactly what Bob Hugin has done.

[**Between his staunch support for Donald Trump and his own personal record at Celgene, Bob Hugin will never be on our side. Chip in $3 or more right now and help Democratic Senator Bob Menendez beat Hugin in November.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cc3/3af3c5d/3ad1ca78/4ec3d448/4223250245/VEsH/ name: Craig Brown
subject: Take back the corner office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |

The stakes couldn't be higher, friends.
Governor Chris Sununu is taking New Hampshire backward, and it's no secret why. He's too concerned with pushing the agenda of the wealthy special interests bankrolling his campaign.
**That 's why Molly Kelly isn't taking even one dollar of corporate money. **You can count on her to put the interests of you and your family first - every time. But that means she's depending on grassroots supporters like you to help her flip New Hampshire blue in November.
**With just 54 days until Election Day, we still need 4,859 donors to become Founding Members of this campaign to help Molly take back the corner office for Democrats. **
**We need you to give now, before time runs out:** **[_Please, rush $5 right now - every dollar you can spare - to become a Founding Member of this campaign to defeat Sununu in November and flip New Hampshire blue!_](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc497d/d0ce7de/51b4131b/9cd635e/4050053395/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTIzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk123-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Todd
subject: Steve King just can’t help himself…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
**We’ve tried to make this campaign about J.D. Scholten and what he’s fighting for:** A healthcare system, an economy, and a government that works for all of us. We’d prefer to talk about J.D.’s positive vision of “Standing Tall for All” and building this district’s future, a district where all are equally respected and a place where racism and hatred have no place.
But Steve King keeps getting in the way. I can guarantee you this: If elected to Congress, you won’t see J.D. making national headlines like the ones below from yesterday. J.D. won’t be an embarrassment to the people of this district the way that Steve King has been. We have no desire to waste our time calling Steve King names. **So, today we’ll let the headlines do the talking:**
As one of the top agricultural districts in the country, Iowa’s 4th District should be making headlines as leaders in feeding and fueling the world—not as a leader in dividing the country apart with racist rhetoric.
[**_Please contribute what you can today so we can replace Steve King’s politics of division and fear, with J.D., who will work with the people of this district to build our future!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2183635/11299882/-1559889692?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzVkZjFlZC05N2I3LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SinoqilQqnF90Fp52pfqVlyrRJzCxVsomZEjxH3Vg-4=)
Thank you,
Todd Prieb
Deputy Campaign Manager

subject: 4,000 strong: The Federal storm response
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 13, 2018
## 4,000 strong: The Federal storm response
#
**President Donald J. Trump and senior officials** are monitoring multiple storms this week, including Florence, Olivia, Mangkut, and Isaac. The Administration began putting precautionary measures in place for these weather events before Labor Day. **More than 4,000 Federal employees** , including more than 1,000 from the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA), are working around the clock in response to these storms. Federal teams have been deployed across the Southeastern United States and Mid-Atlantic regions, including:
* 2 Army Corps of Engineers teams in the Carolinas and Virginia to help plan for debris removal and temporary power support
* 5 Department of Health and Human Services Disaster Medical Assistance teams in the Carolinas, Maryland, and Virginia
* 7 FEMA Incident Management Assistance teams
* 16 FEMA Urban Search and Rescue teams, including swift water rescue task forces
* Coast Guard personnel positioned in the Carolinas, Georgia, and Virginia to quickly mobilize in support of search-and-rescue efforts

**The private sector is the first source** for goods in affected areas, and if those supplies are exhausted, State, local, and volunteer agencies step in to provide additional assistance. Among the resources already in place are more than 11 million meals, 18 million liters of water, 60,000 cots, and 1 million blankets. **It is the job of the Federal Government** to support these parties any way it can. FEMA has more than two dozen Incident Support Bases, Distribution Centers, and other sites with life-saving supplies throughout the East Coast, the Caribbean, Hawaii, Guam, and the Northern Marianas Islands. FEMA National and Regional Response Coordination Centers have also been activated to coordinate with local actors. **“The safety of American people** is my absolute highest priority,” President Trump said this week. “We are sparing no expense.” **[What to know about the Federal response to these deadly storms.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEzLjk0ODc3OTgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMy45NDg3Nzk4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg2MDMwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-administration-preparing-critical-resources-personnel-support-hurricane-response-efforts/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) subject: an unconscionable attack on affordable care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Here’s the news: The Republicans’ latest lawsuit aims to GUT
protections for those with pre-existing conditions, meaning
millions of America’s most vulnerable people could lose their
coverage and be left with nothing.

Act now: Dan is leading the fight for lowering healthcare
costs through bipartisan channels. We need you to chip in to
support our efforts ASAP. Contribute here →
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-defend-healthcare?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180913_1_2&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Please read our message below, and then follow this link to
help!
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-defend-healthcare?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180913_1_2&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Begin forwarded message:

Peter — The Republicans have
launched a broadside attack against the provisions of the
Affordable Care Act that guarantee coverage for pre-existing
conditions.

This could be catastrophic and life-threatening for millions
of Americans who rely on this insurance for access to medicine
and treatment.

Dan is racing to stop this attack, but we need you to act
fast: Click here to help Dan continue his work for bipartisan
solutions to lower healthcare premiums and protect coverage for
pre-existing conditions→
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-defend-healthcare?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180913_1_2&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

This lawsuit, brought by 20 GOP states, aims to strike down
rules requiring insurers to cover those of us who need health
care the most.

To make matters worse, the Trump administration is refusing
to defend the rules in court.

That means it’s up to us to defend protections for those
suffering from pre-existing conditions.

DEFEND OUR HEALTH CARE
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-defend-healthcare?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180913_1_2&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Dan has been working across the aisle to bring down premiums
for Americans across the country, but his good work won’t make an
impact if the Republicans gut the ACA’s protections entirely.

We need you to take a stand for our health care. Contribute
here to help us mobilize everything we have to defend protections
for preexisting conditions and keep healthcare affordable →
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-defend-healthcare?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180913_1_2&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Thanks for acting quickly.

Team Lipinski

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax
deductible.

| Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |

| | | | "Can you comment on your personal opinion on whether _Obergefell_ was correctly decided? It's a yes or no."

-Sen. Kamala Harris, SCOTUS confirmation hearing, 9/6/18
---

It's one of the reasons I admire Kamala so much, and it's why I'm so excited to ask you this question, Peter: **Would you like to get together with Kamala Harris and me in a few weeks?**

name: Dana Bye
subject: a new poll of our race is out -- and it’s close!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
The New York Times polled voters in VA-7, and the final results came in late last night.
| | Peter, some important news about our race came out this week. _The New York Times_ polled voters in VA-7, and the final results came in late last night: In their poll, **Abigail is running _just four points_ behind Rep. Dave Brat,** 43 percent to his 47 percent.** ** This result is within the margin of error, and 9 percent of voters are undecided. **This race is truly a Toss Up!!** [**Will you make a donation of any size to our campaign today, so that we can continue to earn the support of voters in the 7th district and close this polling gap?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/A3Wbh0uY8kYRDT-x7KArCXa8mK7J1e4VdOgL12sJUBI=/xLu06GQfz4gt-T0mn2D-W8M8ZCerglK9xQT6JZXh5p0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.13_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Peter, we are excited about these results. Rep. Brat won VA-7 with 58 percent of the vote just two years ago! Our grassroots campaign has pushed this race to within the margin of error. **This poll tells us that we can win this district, but we need to keep up the pace towards November!** Many voters interviewed for this poll said they are not yet familiar with Abigail -- so we have room to grow our support, if we can share her compelling story with them. Closing this gap will take a tremendous amount of work, to be sure -- we must knock thousands more doors, make thousands more phone calls, and make our case to voters through our advertisements on television and elsewhere. **But I am confident that we can and will succeed, with this community of grassroots supporters behind us.** [**Peter, consider making a donation to Team Spanberger today to help us close this gap.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/A3Wbh0uY8kYRDT-x7KArCXa8mK7J1e4VdOgL12sJUBI=/xLu06GQfz4gt-T0mn2D-W8M8ZCerglK9xQT6JZXh5p0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.13_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/A3Wbh0uY8kYRDT-x7KArCXa8mK7J1e4VdOgL12sJUBI=/xLu06GQfz4gt-T0mn2D-W8M8ZCerglK9xQT6JZXh5p0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.13_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/A3Wbh0uY8kYRDT-x7KArCXa8mK7J1e4VdOgL12sJUBI=/xLu06GQfz4gt-T0mn2D-W8M8ZCerglK9xQT6JZXh5p0=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/A3Wbh0uY8kYRDT-x7KArCXa8mK7J1e4VdOgL12sJUBI=/2Nx7G2EV6ozDbGsvbg5rJtEWwNr5LhVsT8HmGL6wL1A=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Three ways you can help us win right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
#
Peter -
We're just hours away from polls closing. It's crunch time, and we need to make sure everyone turns out to vote for Zephyr.
This is going to be a close race, and everything you can do to help us in these final hours is going to matter. So here's what we need:
1- Have you voted for Zephyr, yet? If not, **[make sure you have a plan and know where your polling location is.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78096c/6e822e2f/1d2a7011/4173b3d2/756258998/VEsH/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov")**
2- Help us persuade and turn out more voters for Zephyr. The last poll showed 30% of voters were undecided. There's a good chance you know someone undecided or persuadable, and you're our best messenger to win their vote for Zephyr. So call, text and email everyone you know. Share it on your social media pages too:
[Share on Facebook](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78096c/6e822e2f/1d2a7011/4173b3d3/756258998/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.nytimes.com/2018/08/19/opinion/zephyr-teachout-new-york-attorney-general.html")
[Share on Twitter](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78096c/6e822e2f/1d2a7011/4173b3d4/756258998/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/home?status=Join%20me%20in%20voting%20for%20%40ZephyrTeachout%20for%20Attorney%20General%20today!%20Polls%20close%20at%209%20PM%20across%20the%20state.%0A%0AZephyr%27s%20the%20most%20qualified%20candidate%20in%20the%20race.%20See%20why%20the%20New%20York%20Times%20endorsed%20her,%20and%20then%20make%20sure%20you%20go%20vote%20today!%20https%3A//www.nytimes.com/2018/08/19/opinion/zephyr-teachout-new-york-attorney-general.html")
Don't know what to say in your messages? Here's a helpful list of some of the top reasons people are supporting Zephyr:
* In their endorsement, the New York Times said: "Democrats who are seeking a means of standing up to the Trump presidency and graft in Albany can find in Ms. Teachout their most effective champion for democracy and civil rights, good government and the environment, workers' rights, fair housing and gender equality."
* She literally wrote the book on corruption and will make it a priority to root out the corruption in Albany that's poisoned our democracy.
* She's the only candidate for AG not taking corporate money. So she will be totally independent of the political machine and corporate donors -- she's going to investigate them, not work for them. That includes breaking up the corporate monopolies that are buying elections and hurting working people.
* She sued Donald Trump on day three of his administration and has led the emoluments lawsuit strategy. She is the best candidate to fight back against the corruption and lawlessness of the Trump administration.
* She's going to lead the legal argument to end mass incarceration. As she says, "the wrong people are in jail." That means ending cash bail, discovery reform, legalizing marijuana, speedy trials and more.
* She will protect our environment -- ensuring all New Yorkers have clean water and clean air. She's the only candidate who pledged to take no fossil fuel money.

3- **[Sign up to text undecided voters this afternoon. It's simple and highly effective!](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78096c/6e822e2f/1d2a7011/4173b3d5/756258998/VEsC/ "https://spoke.zephyrforny.com/login?nextUrl=/b03d63bc-160c-4858-9ec9-c25621a02fa3/join")**
The outcome of this race is in our hands. If we come together, we can push Zephyr over the finish line and win this.
Thanks for your support!
\- Team Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78096c/6e822e2f/1d2a7011/4173b3d6/756258998/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180913-gotv")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78096c/6e822e2f/1d2a7011/4173b3d7/756258998/VEsA/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78096c/6e822e2f/1d2a7011/4173b3d8/756258998/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

subject: opponents look at our numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | You know this about me by now. When Betsy DeVos puts the needs of the NRA before the needs of our students, **I fight back.** When President Trump tries to interfere with the Mueller investigation, **I fight back.** When Republicans in Congress try to repeal affordable health care, defund Planned Parenthood, or destroy Medicare and Social Security -- **I fight back.** **And when I ask all of you to help us reach aggressive goals and keep fighting, you wow me every time.** I need you to do that now. [**We're staring down a very important FEC deadline this month -- the last FEC end-of-quarter deadline of this election. Help us get to our $28,000 goal before it hits. Make a contribution.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca3/622b7b5b/1cdfd459/307b6dc4/3517804079/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180913z?refcode=dwse180913z_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca3/622b7b5b/1cdfd459/307b6dc7/3517804079/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwOTEzeiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180913z?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse180913z_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca3/622b7b5b/1cdfd459/307b6dc7/3517804079/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwOTEzeiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180913z?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse180913z_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca3/622b7b5b/1cdfd459/307b6dc7/3517804079/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwOTEzeiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180913z?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse180913z_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca3/622b7b5b/1cdfd459/307b6dc6/3517804079/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwOTEzeiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180913z?refcode=dwse180913z_m_other&refcode2=861769")** When the FEC gets our numbers, it makes them public. That means not only can my opponents see what we've taken in, so can their special interest allies, the Trump administration, the press, and whomever else cares to look. Missing goals can make us look weak -- and what's worse, missing goals actually weakens our ability to keep up our grassroots efforts. And considering we need to get everyone out to vote to help the ticket up and down the ballot, we just can't let that happen. Florida families count on me to be their voice in Washington. I try to live up to that every single day. **Right now, I'm counting on you to reach this goal.** [**Give what you can and help us reach this $28,000 FEC goal.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca3/622b7b5b/1cdfd459/307b6dc4/3517804079/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180913z?refcode=dwse180913z_m&recurring=true&amount=5") | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca3/622b7b5b/1cdfd459/307b6dc4/3517804079/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180913z?refcode=dwse180913z_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
Thank you.
Debbie
