name: Eddie Edwards
subject: We're going to flip this seat.
body:
Derek, It is a great honor to be the Republican nominee in the First Congressional District, and people are fired up from Portsmouth to Manchester through the White Mountains. In order to win this November, we cannot rest on our laurels. We're running a positive campaign that relies on people talking and amplifying our message. This weekend is the first between now and the general election. [We have locations throughout the state that will help turn out the vote for me, Steve Negron, and Chris Sununu.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyPp0LnUzJbJd5sqRe8vU00k-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M-2BdS-2BDGlBGz4hxN4XKgvmFcLKr1K63kLkR1lWrjyZa-2FNiL-2BWDZdae0-2Fw-2Bfo8HUwRTulVs-2B7E9ygireoLh07HxxSMXGkFD83s6lbwU1vwW-2BJ0qFeZSz3ZVTYH-2BMjXaj1UEw0Rr0YaRPd3kL0zejxz1wHIAn5Dj8kKKXuER17Tp1-2BvwX-2F9YxqNgO-2BD6meziH3oTEL2wcYMwQpaJbXttn-2F0e5TGj7OSn6A-2BWp6SKo8whldGXSSUge-2BdInrP2ofiqu4fyzTTRdmEd7EHvm9JUWaQojQ-3D-3D) We're a united team that will fight together in order to win. name: Steve Sisolak
subject: Did you know — I went to public school
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/O4LtbQgBXXg1xrrq4w-xRCxh-Hd59WzK-Z_xL433T04=/Xpa3fwAW6hx4uxr5x8zcAjmin7OEDcOfxywChRrKGU8=?gpsid=37_57_3573&refcode=em18_180913_belvad_LG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180913_belvad_LG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssisonoskip=true)
---
Dear Friend,

I went to public schools. Both my daughters went to public high school. And I believe in public education. That's why as governor, I'll make the changes we need to fix school systems across this great state.

Recently, I visited my daughters' high school and talked to their former world history teacher, and she told me she was assigned 48 students this semester -- but she only has 42 desks. How can we expect teachers to teach like this? It's unacceptable.

But there isn't just one thing we need to improve our schools; there are many.

**[Listen, I have a plan to get it done. Watch our new ad where I explain the changes I'd make. Then, if you can, chip in $5 to help us spread the word.](https://act.myngp.com/el/O4LtbQgBXXg1xrrq4w-xRCxh-Hd59WzK-Z_xL433T04=/Xpa3fwAW6hx4uxr5x8zcAjmin7OEDcOfxywChRrKGU8=?gpsid=37_57_3573&refcode=em18_180913_belvad_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180913_belvad_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssisonoskip=true)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/O4LtbQgBXXg1xrrq4w-xRCxh-Hd59WzK-Z_xL433T04=/Xpa3fwAW6hx4uxr5x8zcAjmin7OEDcOfxywChRrKGU8=?gpsid=37_57_3573&refcode=em18_180913_belvad_IG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180913_belvad_IG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssisonoskip=true)
[WATCH THE AD](https://act.myngp.com/el/O4LtbQgBXXg1xrrq4w-xRCxh-Hd59WzK-Z_xL433T04=/Xpa3fwAW6hx4uxr5x8zcAjmin7OEDcOfxywChRrKGU8=?gpsid=37_57_3573&refcode=em18_180913_belvad_B1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180913_belvad_B1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssisonoskip=true)
We've got to raise teacher pay, reduce class sizes, and cut back on the testing that gets in the way of real learning. We need to invest in the trades, instead of telling every kid to go rack up tens of thousands of dollars in debt. We're leading kids down the wrong road by overselling and under delivering.

I'm the only candidate in this race who can get it done. My opponent is paying plenty of lip service to students, teachers, and parents -- but what he isn't saying is that his slash-and-burn budget plan would starve our state of the resources we will need to do right by kids and their educators.

**[Will you watch the video and then chip in to help us get it on the air? I want everyone to know about my plan to fix our schools. I won't stop until we get it done.](https://act.myngp.com/el/O4LtbQgBXXg1xrrq4w-xRCxh-Hd59WzK-Z_xL433T04=/Xpa3fwAW6hx4uxr5x8zcAjmin7OEDcOfxywChRrKGU8=?gpsid=37_57_3573&refcode=em18_180913_belvad_L2_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180913_belvad_L2_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssisonoskip=true)**

Thanks,

Steve

clean_body: Dear Friend, I went to public schools. Both my daughters went to public high school. And I believe in public education. That's why as governor, I'll make the changes we need to fix school systems across this great state. Recently, I visited my daughters' high school and talked to their former world history teacher, and she told me she was assigned 48 students this semester -- but she only has 42 desks. How can we expect teachers to teach like this? It's unacceptable. But there isn't just one thing we need to improve our schools; there are many. We've got to raise teacher pay, reduce class sizes, and cut back on the testing that gets in the way of real learning. We need to invest in the trades, instead of telling every kid to go rack up tens of thousands of dollars in debt. We're leading kids down the wrong road by overselling and under delivering. I'm the only candidate in this race who can get it done. My opponent is paying plenty of lip service to students, teachers, and parents -- but what he isn't saying is that his slash-and-burn budget plan would starve our state of the resources we will need to do right by kids and their educators. Thanks, Steve PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK Friends for Steve Sisolak P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas NV 89125 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Let's do more together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
With your support, our campaign took an important first step to continue Rhode Island's momentum. I promise you this: I will continue working my heart out for you. A few years ago, Rhode Island wasn't in a good place. We had the highest unemployment rate in the nation. Our roads, bridges, and schools were crumbling. Rhode Islanders were hungry for change, and for the last few years, we have been working as hard as we can to bring that change.
Last night, the people of Rhode Island spoke. They said, "Do more, go faster, and keep going!" And that's exactly what we are going to do.
November is right around the corner, and for Rhode Island, the stakes could not be higher. We all must work together to safeguard our progress and continue to bring the change that Rhode Island needs.
Thank you for your support -- onward to November!
Gina

name: Ryan Mulcahy
subject: campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It feels like yesterday that we learned who our far-right opponent would be. In reality, it's been more than two weeks, and a LOT has happened...
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f4d/1a8421e1/1a58e485c/49029939/2684379693/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, let me tell you -- it feels like yesterday that we learned who our far-right opponent would be (Wendy Rogers, who is so extreme _she thinks Social Security is unconstitutional_ \-- [**you can make a donation to help us defeat her here**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.13_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")). But in reality, it's been more than two weeks, and now we are 13 days into September... and a LOT has happened in that time.
* We went up on TV with our first ad of the general election, an important way we'll share Tom's independent record with voters in our district.
* **We printed new campaign T-shirts, so we can all show our support for Tom!**
* Rogers released a HUGELY misleading ad, attacking Tom.

That last one is the development that has me most worried, friends. Rogers's attacks on Tom have no basis in fact, but she has far-right Super PACs determined to unseat Tom, so you can bet that they will try to amplify her misleading message. We're counting on this grassroots team to make sure we can fight back. So, September is going fast, and we don't have any time to waste. [**Can you make a donation today to ensure that we re-elect Tom and KEEP AZ-01 BLUE in November?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.13_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Ryan Mulcahy Campaign Manager | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.13_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

** **
** **

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Cate Domino, bobcasey.com
subject: Hey, thanks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e62b6/51dbcc2a/1deec070/3a8ec38/1295869797/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") I wanted to say thanks, team. To you and to Michael in Scranton, Peter in State College, Diane in Quakertown and to every grassroots supporter who is investing in this campaign.

Thanks to the support of this team, Bob has made it to today -- 54 days from Election Day -- with the resources to power a strong campaign. I know he's so grateful for that, and so am I and the rest of the staff here at Campaign HQ.

But here's the thing, unfortunately: Bob needs additional support from people like you to sustain this campaign through November 6. Our campaign manager has told me that, if we don't raise $50,000 by midnight on Saturday, she's cutting our advertising budget. We need to be telling more voters about Bob, what he's accomplished for them and why it's important to show up on Election Day, so I'm asking you to help save the ad budget.

**Grassroots supporters like you will power this campaign in the final push -- chip in right now to help close the budget gap and send Bob back to the Senate:** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Do you know Kyrsten?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | First off, I need to thank everyone who has shared my latest TV ad or contributed to our Media Fund so we can keep our ad running. I appreciate your support and generosity in getting the word out about my campaign.

Democrats are fighting hard to defend key Senate seats (like mine) this year, but we're also looking to expand the map and flip critical seats blue.

[**That 's why I want to make sure you know about Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona.**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b734/43d8135f/67634a61/5100050b/3030097580/VEsH/ "https://emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/kyrsten-sinema-18?source=heinrich&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+I+want+to+make+sure+you+k&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5")

Kyrsten has been a powerful advocate for women and families in the House, and she now has an unprecedented opportunity to flip a historically red seat blue. Will you help Kyrsten take on her extreme opponent and join me in the Senate?

[**This is a must-win seat for Democrats this year -- we can't take back the Senate without it. Can you contribute $29 or more today so we can have Kyrsten in the Senate?**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b734/43d8135f/67634a61/5100050a/3030097580/VEsE/ "https://emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/kyrsten-sinema-18?source=heinrich&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+This+is+a+mustwin+seat+for+Democrats+thi&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5")
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b734/43d8135f/67634a61/5100050d/3030097580/VEsF/ "https://emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/kyrsten-sinema-18?source=heinrich&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+CONTRIBUTE+NOW&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5")** **Kyrsten is facing Rep. Martha McSally, who has voted to take away Americans ' health care in the House. **We have to do everything to protect our care from extremist Republicans like McSally.

This is an open Senate seat, meaning it is prime to be picked up by Democrats. State demographics are changing nationwide, and this previously ruby-red Senate seat is turning purple. This is our chance to fight back.

[**That 's why it is so critical we put up a fight for Kyrsten. Click here to donate now so Kyrsten has what it takes to win in November ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b734/43d8135f/67634a61/5100050c/3030097580/VEsC/ "https://emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/kyrsten-sinema-18?source=heinrich&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Thatrsquos+why+it+is+so+critical+we+put+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5")

Thanks,
Martin
---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b734/43d8135f/67634a61/5100050f/3030097580/VEsD/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b734/43d8135f/67634a61/5100050e/3030097580/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b734/43d8135f/67634a61/51000531/3030097580/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b734/43d8135f/67634a61/51000530/3030097580/VEsO/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b734/43d8135f/67634a61/51000533/3030097580/VEsP/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180913_3_5").

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: ❗ Polls are in for 3 of our most competitive Senate races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb5c2/24c69fd9/24a9c689c/18b9c232/2009486697/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEU43N_digital_email_20180913_SenPollsTextNonOpens_inact&source=WQEFEU43N_digital_email_20180913_SenPollsTextNonOpens_inact")
---

Peter,

New polls are in for some of our most critical Senate races:
* WISCONSIN: **Tammy Baldwin** has just a two-point edge over Leah Vukmir (R), 49% - 47%.

* MISSOURI: **Claire McCaskill** is dead-even with Josh Hawley (R), 47% - 47%.

* NEVADA: **Jacky Rosen** is trailing Dean Heller (R) by just one point, 40% - 41%.

With control of the Senate hanging by just a two-seat margin, we need to make sure our women are able to edge out their opponents, win their elections, and help flip the Senate.

**[Donate $3 to help elect Tammy, Claire, Jacky, and all of our pro-choice Democratic women running for the Senate>>](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb5c2/24c69fd9/24a9c689c/18b9c233/2009486697/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180906_email_SeptSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+Tammy+Claire+Jack&utm_campaign=WQEFEU43N_digital_email_20180913_SenPollsTextNonOpens_inact&source=WQEFEU43N_digital_email_20180913_SenPollsTextNonOpens_inact")**

Now that primary season is coming to a close, our women will be giving everything they've got to win this November.

Tammy and Claire are both up for re-election in states Donald Trump won in 2016, and Republicans are determined to take their seats. (The GOP is already spending millions to defeat both of them!)

And Jacky is running for one of the two seats we need to flip in order to take back the Senate. Heller is deeply unpopular, but challenging an incumbent is a big hurdle.

We have to give it all we've got to help shift polls in our women's favor -- and keep them there through Election Day.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Senate-Women](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb5c2/24c69fd9/24a9c689c/18b9c22c/2009486697/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180906_email_SeptSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectSenateWomen&utm_campaign=WQEFEU43N_digital_email_20180913_SenPollsTextNonOpens_inact&source=WQEFEU43N_digital_email_20180913_SenPollsTextNonOpens_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb5c2/24c69fd9/24a9c689c/18b9c22d/2009486697/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180906_email_SeptSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFEU43N_digital_email_20180913_SenPollsTextNonOpens_inact&source=WQEFEU43N_digital_email_20180913_SenPollsTextNonOpens_inact")

|

name: TimKaine.com
subject: Derek, did you see our petition? Sign your name if you're a "NO" on Judge Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, did you see our petition? [Sign your name if you're a "NO" on Judge Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11c9/3e0906/7391c708/3e363eca/2362611559/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180913_2_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Sign+your+name+if+yoursquore+a+ldquoNOrd&utm_campaign=20180913_2_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-NS")
* * *
Derek, in the coming weeks, the Senate will be voting on Judge Brett Kavanaugh's _lifetime appointment_ to the Supreme Court.

If appointed, Brett Kavanaugh would be arguably the most pro-presidential-powers justice we have ever had. _Perhaps that is exactly why he was hand-selected by President Trump._

When meeting with Judge Kavanaugh, Tim was not assured that the judge would respect the precedence of critical decisions that so many Americans rely on for their families, their liberties, and their health care options.

[Tim will be voting "No." If you agree, sign our petition rejecting Judge Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11c9/3e0906/7391c708/3e363ec9/2362611559/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180913_2_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Tim+will+be+voting+ldquoNordquo+If+you+a&utm_campaign=20180913_2_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-NS")

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: There's still time to vote. [polls open until 9 PM]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Polls are open until 9 PM.
#

Peter -
We have about two hours left until polls close. Polls are open until 9 PM, and we need to make sure every one of our supporters makes their voice heard before then.
**[So if you haven't voted yet, find your polling location and go vote!](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780952/6e822e2f/1d147184/4173b2f8/43996074/VEsH/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov")**
If you have voted, then call 10 of your friends right now and make sure they have voted as well.
This is one of the most important elections in the country right now. When we cannot trust the federal government, the New York Attorney General can be a check on the corruption and lawlessness of the White House.
This is it. Everything comes down to these final few hours, and everything you can do -- every voter you can turn out for our campaign -- will matter tremendously. We've said from the start: The only way we will win is if we're in this together.
So please, claim a piece of this campaign and help us get across the finish line. If everyone reading this right now called 10 friends to vote, it would have an enormous impact on tonight's results.
Thank you for everything you've done for our movement. Now, let's go win this race!
All my best,
Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780952/6e822e2f/1d147184/4173b2f9/43996074/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180913-gotv-2")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY

1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780952/6e822e2f/1d147184/4173b2fa/43996074/VEsF/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780952/6e822e2f/1d147184/4173b2fb/43996074/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Weakening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
One by one, they're taking down our environmental protections.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc17/2f5ea88d/7597c476/2cbc4544/1981532068/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month_1&refcode=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month_1&utm_campaign=mid-month&utm_medium=ema") Friend, **First** , it was the lowering of auto emissions standards to pump more carbon dioxide into our atmosphere. **Then** , Trump repealed the Clean Power Plan, proposing a replacement that would let coal power plants spew unchecked amounts of air pollutants from the nation's smokestacks. By their own estimates, 1,400 more people would die prematurely each year from such high levels of pollution. **But now?** Trump and his climate-change-denying administration are making it easier for oil companies to release methane into our air. **This is a huge step backwards in our fight against climate change.** [**They're taking down our environmental protections, one by one. And that's why I need you to help me build our climate movement now. Can you contribute before our big mid-month deadline on September 15?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc17/2f5ea88d/7597c476/2cbc4544/1981532068/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month_1&refcode=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month_1&utm_campaign=mid-month&utm_medium=ema") The Trump administration's new proposals would allow far more methane to leak from oil and gas drilling operations. clean_body: One by one, they're taking down our environmental protections. | "" Friend, First , it was the lowering of auto emissions standards to pump more carbon dioxide into our atmosphere. Then , Trump repealed the Clean Power Plan, proposing a replacement that would let coal power plants spew unchecked amounts of air pollutants from the nation's smokestacks. By their own estimates, 1,400 more people would die prematurely each year from such high levels of pollution. But now? Trump and his climate-change-denying administration are making it easier for oil companies to release methane into our air. This is a huge step backwards in our fight against climate change. "" The Trump administration's new proposals would allow far more methane to leak from oil and gas drilling operations. But such regulations are absolutely necessary for making sure their equipment isn't emitting countless tons of methane into our atmosphere -- permanently.
